title: senecio lanceus
intro: Senecio lanceus, also known as lance-leaf ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Senecio lanceus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its traditional use in treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are used to alleviate various health conditions, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
